body.title: Migrate all SQLite-ism callers to native Postgres SQL and delete the db_proxy shim
body.text:
# D-sqlite-migration-phase-bc-2026-05-05
**title:** Migrate all SQLite-ism callers to native Postgres SQL and delete the db_proxy shim
**date:** 2026-05-05
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-sqlite-out-main-pragma, T-sqlite-out-small-callers, T-sqlite-out-word-graph, T-sqlite-out-cortex, T-db-proxy-shim-delete

## Decision narrative
Phase A inventory (T-db-proxy-sqlite-shim-retire) confirmed 6 files use db_proxy's SQLite-compat translation layer. This decision covers the full migration: all callers switch to native Postgres SQL (ON CONFLICT, strpos, %s, RETURNING id), then the shim classes are deleted from db_proxy.py. cortex.py is HIGH-inertia and requires Akien pre-approval before sprinting. See Phase A inventory at lab/design_docs/db-proxy-sqlite-callsites-20260505.md.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-06T00:00:56.952637+00:00
**Ticket count:** 6 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-sqlite-out-main-pragma (S) — CLOSED: Remove PRAGMA wal_checkpoint block from main.py  `done` — Removed PRAGMA wal_checkpoint try/except block from main.py — was a shim no-op; commit 44b5d500
- T-sqlite-out-small-callers (S) — CLOSED: Migrate budget.py + notebook.py + pending_replies.py to native Postgres  `done` — budget.py + notebook.py + pending_replies.py fully migrated to native Postgres; test class updated to Postgres; 4483 tests pass; commit 7ad45110
- T-sqlite-out-word-graph (M) — CLOSED: Migrate word_graph.py to native Postgres SQL  `done` — word_graph.py fully migrated: INSTR→strpos, INSERT OR REPLACE/IGNORE→ON CONFLICT, ?→%s, SELECT changes()→RETURNING; 4483 tests pass; commit 8cf0af9a
- T-sqlite-out-cortex (L) — CLOSED: Migrate cortex.py 129 SQLite sites to native Postgres  `done` — cortex.py fully migrated: INSERT OR REPLACE→ON CONFLICT, lastrowid→RETURNING, dead SQLite branches removed, 129 ?→%s. 4189 tests pass. commit bc7f65f6
- T-sqlite-out-learner (S) — CLOSED: Migrate learner.py SQLite-isms to native Postgres  `done` — learner.py migrated: 9 ?→%s sites, SELECT changes()→rowcount; Calibre SQLite queries left intentionally. 20 tests pass. commit b16f9389
- T-db-proxy-shim-delete (S) — NEEDS DESIGN: Trim SQLite-translation methods from _PGConnWrapper (after learner.py migrated)  `done` — 207 lines deleted: _INSTR_RE, _translate_insert_or_replace, executescript, PRAGMA no-op, SELECT changes() shim, lastrowid. _PGConnWrapper stays (savepoint/context mgr). commit 5cf77cf8.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
